tests/test_api.py end-to-end flow; full suite 34 passing
All 9 Phase 1 children complete: schemas, deps, 9 routers, end-to-end tests. 34 tests passing, 30 /api routes.

Frontend spine complete: react-router-dom v7 + TanStack Query v5 wired in main.tsx; src/lib/money.ts (milliunit<->display + parse), src/lib/{types,api,queryClient,queries}.ts (typed fetch client covering full /api surface + RQ hooks), src/components/AppShell.tsx (sidebar nav + RTA badge via useBudget + uncategorized badge via useUncategorizedCount) + 8 page-stub routes. Verified: tsc --noEmit clean, 26 frontend tests pass (vitest), production build OK, and live smoke test against FastAPI (health/budget/uncategorized-count + SPA from dist) all green.
ReadyToAssignHeader: shows RTA headline + income/assigned, 3 color-coded states (to-assign/all-assigned/over-assigned), loading skeleton + error note. Mocked-hook tests (6) pass.

EnvelopeGrid: TanStack Table v8, grouped category rows w/ assigned subtotals, editable Assigned cell (parseMoneyInput -> useAssign mutation, commit on blur/Enter, revert on invalid, Escape cancels), negative Available styled rose. Tests (8) pass. Integrated into BudgetPage with ReadyToAssignHeader.

useAssign now optimistic: exported pure applyOptimisticAssign transform (assigned/available/ready_to_assign/assigned_total accounting), onMutate cancels+snapshots+writes keyed on queryKeys.budget(month) mirroring useBudget, onError rolls back, onSettled invalidates. 6 new tests; full suite green.

MoveMoneyPanel: accessible dialog, From/To selects from useBudget categories, parseMoneyInput amount, useMove mutation, cover-overspending affordance that fills the destination's shortfall. 8 tests. Wired into BudgetPage via Move money button.

Covered by tests written alongside the components: money.test.ts (16 cases: milliunit format/parse/round-trip), EnvelopeGrid.test.tsx (8: editable cell parse/commit/revert + grouping + negative styling), queries.optimistic.test.ts (6: optimistic assign apply/accounting). Vitest infra (jsdom, RTL, setup, scripts) also in place. 54 frontend tests total.

Phase 2 complete: all children closed (fqa spine, 3sp RTA header, ae7 EnvelopeGrid, ax9 optimistic assign, 42e move-money, ds0 tests). Editable envelope cockpit works end-to-end on the React+TanStack Query spine; 54 tests pass, tsc clean, production build OK, live API smoke verified.
Phase 3 pages built on the spine, reviewed, and fixed. 88 frontend tests pass, tsc clean, build OK.

Rules panel: create (field/type/pattern/category/priority), list in priority order, delete (confirm), apply-now surfacing the server count. Reviewed + fixed: create/apply/delete errors surfaced, pattern kept on failure, priority clamped, typed match unions. 101 frontend tests pass, tsc clean, build OK.

Phase 3 complete: Import, Transactions, Categories, and Rules pages all built on the spine, reviewed, fixed, and tested (101 frontend tests). Import/Transactions/Categories merged in PR #2; Rules panel on phase-3/rules-panel.
Phase 4 pages built on the spine (recharts), reviewed, fixed (deep-dive fetch gating, tooltip milliunits, hardened tests). 126 frontend tests pass, tsc clean, build OK.

Phase 4 complete: Dashboard, Spending Analysis, and Alerts pages built on the spine (recharts), reviewed, fixed, and tested (126 frontend tests). New /spending route + nav.

FastAPI serves built SPA on one port: /assets via StaticFiles + catch-all index.html fallback for BrowserRouter deep links; unknown /api/* still 404 JSON. 5 SPA tests added (39 pass), verified live on :8077.

Deleted app.py, pages/ (8 files), .streamlit/; removed streamlit + orphaned plotly from pyproject + uv.lock; dropped dead streamlit import in src/utils/config.py (load_alert_thresholds now returns defaults — was only self-referenced). 39 backend tests pass.
backend/launch.py: 'uv run bud' (console script) + 'python -m backend.launch' boot uvicorn on backend.main:app:8000 and open browser; BUD_PORT/BUD_NO_BROWSER env overrides. Verified health=200 live.
frontend/e2e/happy-path.spec.ts (3 specs) via Playwright chromium; self-contained webServer builds+boots single-process server; covers app load, nav, and SPA deep-link fallback. 3/3 pass.
README.md rewritten for React+FastAPI+SQLite single-process stack; documents 'uv run bud' production mode + two-process dev mode + all 3 test suites.
Phase 5 complete: single-process packaging (FastAPI serves SPA), Streamlit retired, bud launch command, Playwright E2E, README. All children closed; full gates green.

README fully documents the new React+FastAPI stack: single-process serving, prod (uv run bud) + dev (uvicorn+vite) workflows, project layout, all three test suites, budgeting math. Streamlit instructions gone.

Added e2e/data-flow.spec.ts covering the full happy path: import OFX → categorize → assign updates RTA ($1,500→$1,450) and Dining Out Available ($7.50) → re-import reports 2 duplicates (FITID dedup). DB-isolated via BUD_DB_PATH on a fresh per-run temp DB. Existing nav/SPA smoke tests retained. All 4 specs pass.

Fixed in PR #7: ensure_local_budget now takes the write lock up front (BEGIN IMMEDIATE) so a concurrent second init blocks then sees the seeded rows, plus INSERT OR IGNORE guard. Verified: parallel E2E against a fresh DB no longer logs the UNIQUE constraint error.

Migration epic complete: React SPA + thin FastAPI shipped, Python core carried over unchanged, Streamlit retired, single-process packaging (uv run bud), and happy-path E2E (bud-j18) all merged/done across Phases 1-5 + PRs #5/#6/#7.
